data.body:
SESSION: Workflow Authoring v2 — FOUNDATION epic designed, decomposed, plan-reviewed, remediated.

=== 0. WHAT THIS SESSION PRODUCED (no code written; this was design + planning) ===
- Rewrote epic rub-hope-smear (da27-c916-f04e-4885) from a /joe-brainstorm PLACEHOLDER into the settled
  FOUNDATION spec; title -> "Workflow authoring v2: contract-bearing prompt/step model + editor authoring".
- Split the MCP-call track into a follow-on epic pithy-valor-amok (bdac-7cc4-4c10-4425), depends_on the
  foundation, relates_to e6d9 (workflow-engine-v2).
- Decomposed the foundation into 11 child stories (walking-skeleton-first), all clarity+check_ac green.
- Ran the plan-review process (epic messy-moose-jig) on the epic AND each child; applied all remediations.
- NOTHING is implemented. All children are OPEN. S0 (5e78) is the only unblocked entry point.

=== 1. DESIGN DECISIONS (the brainstorm, all user-confirmed) ===
- Q1 prompt model = DECOMPOSED TRIPLE (DSPy-style): input + output contract + execution_mode; category ADVISORY.
  Reviewers are a SUBSET via an EXPLICIT category:review/reviewer flag (never inferred from output shape).
- Q2 contract HOME = closed-set front-matter (Prompty spellings: inputs/outputs/description/model/tags +
  rebar extensions execution_mode/category/dimension/applies_to/schema_version) + heavy JSON Schemas referenced
  BY NAME in src/rebar/schemas/. reviewers/catalog.json -> a GENERATED+COMMITTED derived-index lockfile.
- Q3 editor VALIDATION = type-aware expression validation + read-only inspector (connections stay BPMN control-flow;
  NO drawn dataflow ports). Q4 mcp_call = EXTERNAL servers (-> the follow-on epic).
- Q5 MCP two-tier allowlist+secrets (projects ADD, cannot shadow built-in server names). Q6 write-back =
  auto-detect editable nava-rebar checkout (else .rebar/prompts/ override; show resolved path). Q7 MCP discovery =
  cached manifest + explicit refresh.
- Q8a execution_mode FIXED on the prompt (single_turn=zero tools; agentic=current pydantic_ai path) — a conscious
  divergence from DSPy/BAML/pydantic-ai (documented, no parity claim). Q8b v1=foundation, v1.1=MCP+deep-typecheck.
- FRONT-MATTER FINAL: closed key set owned by rebar (NO user-extension area). Unknown keys WARN+PRESERVE
  (forward-compat, not a meta-schema). Canonical-serialized, NO inline comments (git/ticket history carries context).
  Boundary handling = the STANDARD parse-split-rejoin pattern, BUILT over PyYAML (~40 LOC), NOT importing python-frontmatter.
- VALIDATION DEPTH (revised under pressure-test): NO subsumption engine (near-undecidable, no popular+maintained lib;
  even the JSON Schema org says no official tool exists). Instead: name-existence + a 3-STATE SHALLOW structural check
  (top-level required + primitive kind; ABSTAIN UNKNOWN on oneOf/anyOf/not/$ref) at author time, + RUNTIME validation
  against the CONSUMER's input contract (the real safety net; mandatory for LLM output anyway).

=== 2. BUILD-VS-IMPORT (project import bar = popular-on-GitHub AND actively maintained) ===
- NET: ZERO new runtime dependencies. Reuse already-present PyYAML (core), jsonschema+referencing (registry already
  wired in schemas/__init__.py, 2020-12), stdlib fnmatch (applies_to). Build the bespoke bits (front-matter writer,
  derived-index+invariants, shallow compat check). Editor validation = debounced server round-trip to Python jsonschema
  (NO ajv/Monaco; single source of truth; measured p99 ~0.5ms).
- REJECTED imports: ruamel.yaml (NOT on GitHub, single-maintainer), python-frontmatter (borderline, wraps PyYAML),
  jsonsubschema (dormant, draft-04, ~105 stars), pathspec (already solved by stdlib fnmatch), ajv (drift risk + no need).
- PROCESS NOTE (user correction earlier in session): I initially recorded subagent IMPORT verdicts + critique
  refinements AS decisions without vetting them against the bar or getting confirmation. RETRACTED + redone per-capability.
- Standards conformed: JSON Schema 2020-12 everywhere (already true in rebar); schema_version stamped; .gitattributes eol=lf.

=== 3. DERISKING SPIKES (all PASS; scripts in the job tmp, ports planned into child tests) ===
E1 front-matter canonical writer (6 real reviewers round-trip body-byte-for-byte; idempotent; 3 boundary corruptors;
unknown-key warn+preserve; BOM reject). E2 shallow-static + runtime-against-consumer (catches the missing-required
wiring bug; abstains on oneOf). E3 MCP introspect->manifest->call vs REAL serena (21 tools, all inputSchema; opaque
content[] handled even when outputSchema declared; isError graceful) via the already-present mcp SDK. E4 validation
latency (rebar registry-wired Draft202012Validator p99 0.52ms; cross-file $ref resolves locally). E5 derived-index
(deterministic; single-default + no-collision invariants; CI drift gate). E8 merge model (canonical files merge as
ordinary git 3-way text; editor-edit vs agent-hand-edit clean; index regenerated, not merged).

=== 4. DECOMPOSITION (11 children of da27; walking-skeleton-first; DAG via depends_on) ===
S0 5e78 WALKING SKELETON: contract->inspector->validation end-to-end on ONE op (fetch_ticket). [no deps]
S1 e050 scripted-op contracts: backfill all 8 ops. [S0]
S2 d25d front-matter format + canonical writer. [S0]
S3 afe6 reviewer->prompt migration + resolver + derived-index. [S1,S2]
S4 4b2f prompt contracts in IR/runner + execution_mode. [S3]
S5 c768 validation depth: 3-state shallow + runtime-against-consumer. [S1,S4]
S6 6592 editor typed palette + prompt library + authoring/write-back. [S2,S3,S4]
S7 998e in-editor JSON validation (server round-trip) + help. [S1]
S8 a83a properties panel structured fields. [S4,S5]
4df6 roomy-spine-mirth: RE-SCOPED to legible canvas (layout/edge/nesting) only; relates_to S8.
3a8f docs + ADRs for workflow authoring v2 (created during per-child remediation). [S2,S3,S4,S5]
(S9 branch/connection UX = deliberately deferred, NOT created.)

=== 5. PLAN-REVIEW APPLIED (manual run of epic messy-moose-jig's process) ===
- HOW: reused the gate's OWN artifacts — criteria_v8.json (31-criterion rubric) + the 3-pass harness
  (docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/final_gate_3pass.py + three_pass/gate_lib/exp2_agentic). Adapted
  copies run_review_foundation.py + run_review_children.py. To run against the v2 store I put a rebar->.venv/bin/rebar
  PATH shim on PATH (shimbin) and stubbed harness.py's import-time files at ~/.claude/jobs/3ef65161/tmp
  (criteria.json=v8, plans_dso.json={complex_leaf:stub}, epic.json=stub). No edits to the experiment files.
- EPIC review: DET floor PASS; 0 BLOCK; 15 advisory/4 dropped/12 indeterminate. Real findings: roomy-spine-mirth (4df6)
  COLLIDES with the new decomposition (dup properties panel, branch-UX kept-vs-deferred, deps contradiction); execution_mode
  underspecified (T8 critical); get_reviewer replacement API + paths (G1G2); catalog-removal unverified; editor non-happy-paths;
  index-regen-on-authoring; SCRIPTED-OP PALETTE missing (vision gap); terminology drift; docs deliverable; schema_version coexistence.
- PER-CHILD review (proportionate scrutiny level=story -> container G3/G4 + task-only criteria dropped): 0 BLOCK on every
  child; ~96 advisory dominated by recurring cross-cutting themes (all overlays forced on, no top-N cap). HEADLINE REAL DEFECT:
  the proposed new resolver name `resolve_prompt(prompt_id)` COLLIDES with the existing render-step
  resolve_prompt(reviewer,variables,langfuse) at prompts.py:297 (and load_prompt/get_reviewer also exist) -> renamed to get_prompt.

=== 6. REMEDIATIONS APPLIED (all tickets re-gate green) ===
Epic-level (1st pass): terminology mapping, fully-qualified paths, execution_mode AC reworded (prompt front-matter, not IR),
"zero new *Python* deps" scoped, docs AC. + 8 adopted critique refinements folded in. Reconciled 4df6 (re-scoped; S8 owns props panel).
Per-child (2nd pass, 8 specific fixes): S3 get_prompt rename + 4-fn fates + migration stamps execution_mode; S4 execution_mode
default=agentic; S0 no-contract=UNKNOWN/skip + ${{inputs.*}} named constant + inspector empty-state; S1 author input+output
schemas + negative test; S8 setValue->rebar:Config + define "common path" + raw-JSON fallback; S7 /validate response shape
{ok,errors[{path,message}]} + fail-closed Save; S6 closed category vocabulary + palette insertion mechanism; S2 schema_version
write-side deploy ordering. Cross-cutting handled ONCE: epic "Cross-cutting policy" section (a11y deferred for an internal tool;
rollback=git-revert+config gates; failure-path tests blanket) + the new docs/ADR child 3a8f.

=== 7. STATE + NEXT ===
- Foundation epic da27 OPEN with 11 children (all open, gate-pass, file_impact+verify+DAG set). MCP epic bdac OPEN (v1.1).
- IMPLEMENTATION STARTING POINT: claim S0 (5e78), the walking skeleton — validates the whole architecture end-to-end first.
  Then S1/S2 in parallel, etc. per the depends_on DAG.
- NO ticket closures are warranted: this session was design/planning; nothing was implemented, so nothing is "done".
- Store health 4/5: the 8 orphan WARNINGS are PRE-EXISTING and UNRELATED to this work (bridge_state/batch-commit/jira-onboarding
  tasks); none of the new tickets are flagged.

=== 8. ENVIRONMENT / REPRODUCTION ===
- Dev rebar = .venv/bin/rebar (editable, [agents]); the PATH `rebar` is the old pipx v1 and chokes on the v2 store -> the
  plan-review harness used a rebar->.venv shim. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present; mcp + pydantic_ai in .venv.
- Spike scripts + adapted harness runners + raw review JSON live in the job tmp (e1..e8, run_review_foundation.py,
  run_review_children.py, foundation_review_3pass.json, children_review.json). The plan-review gate itself is NOT yet built
  (epic 5fd2/messy-moose-jig) — this was a MANUAL application of its rubric+harness.
